ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight ABC123
ham.body:
Dear Rahul,

Thank you for booking with Skyways. Your flight itinerary is confirmed. Please find the details below:

Flight: ABC123
Date: 25 April 2026
Departure: New Delhi (DEL) – 10:00 AM
Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) – 12:30 PM
Seat: 12A (Aisle)
Check‑in: 8:00 AM (online) or 9:00 AM at the airport
Baggage: 1 free checked bag (23 kg) + 1 carry‑on

Please keep a copy of this email for reference. If you have any questions, contact us at 1800-987-654.

Safe travels and enjoy your trip! Shubh Yatra.

Best Regards,
Skyways Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Action Required – Your FedEx Package Missed Delivery
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx shipment with Tracking No. 1234567890 was not delivered on the scheduled date due to an issue with the recipient address. To avoid return to sender and additional charge, please pay the missed delivery fee of INR 500 within 24 hours.

Click <URL> to settle the fee or call our toll‑free number 1800-123-456. Failure to pay will result in the shipment being returned and additional charges.

Thank you for choosing FedEx. Prompt action is required.

Regards,
FedEx Customer Service
